texto: I go back five generations in Jamaica. My dad grew up in Port Royal, and my mom grew up in Kingston. My family is from the country like West Moreland and also in Manchester. I've been there countless times. As far as cuisine, there's not really much that comes out of Jamaica that's on a plate that I don't like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dule Hill: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I go back five generations in Jamaica. My dad grew up in Port Royal, and my mom grew up in Kingst…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family, country pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de country e port.

I've been there countless times. As far as cuisine, there's not really much that comes out of Jamaica that's on a plate that I don't like.

texto: Whether you're working in corporate America or you're a journalist, construction worker, a teacher or an actor - we're all trying to keep working. If one job is ending, you look for another job. When 'Psych' ends, I will be looking for another job.
explicacao: Citação de Dule Hill sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “Whether you're working in corporate America or you're a journalist, construction worker, a teache…” articula trabalho, america, job em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
